---
description: "After implementing a new feature or making a change, update the documentation in docs/product.md with a clear checklist of requirements and technical details."
---

Worflow:

1. Review existing documentation in docs/product.md to understand the current state and identify where updates are needed based on the new feature or change that was implemented.
2. Update the relevant sections in docs/product.md to reflect the new information. This may include adding new checklist items under "Feature Details" or updating the "Technical Requirements" section.
3. Ensure that the documentation is clear, concise, and accurately reflects the implementation. Use bullet points and checklists to make it easy for developers and stakeholders to understand the requirements and technical details.
4. If necessary, add any additional context or explanations to help clarify the changes for future reference.
